positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric mandala featuring swirling cosmic nebulae, bioluminescent flora, and celestial glyphs. The primary palette should be deep midnight blues, iridescent purples, vibrant teal, and accents of glowing gold and silver. The composition must be circular, centered, and highly detailed, designed as a seamless repeat pattern. The style should blend Art Nouveau fluidity with modern geometric precision, rendered with high contrast, clean line work, and strong negative space. Include abstract cosmic elements like distant galaxies and stylized constellations. Ideal for apparel screen printing.
negative: low detail, blurry, text, signature, watermark, logo, cartoon, childish, poor anatomy, artifacts, noise, grainy, cropped, bad lines
